name: Split-Interest Trust Excess Business Holdings Exception

eligibility.description: Applies to trusts where all income interest is charitable and the aggregate value of the charitable deduction is 60% or less of the trust's fair market value.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Sections 4943 and 4944 (excess business holdings and jeopardy investments) do not apply to certain split-interest trusts where the charitable income interest is 60% or less of the value of the assets.
